viral_tweet.draft:
Hot take: By 2027, most companies won't need 'AI strategists' — they'll need 'AI plumbers.'

The real bottleneck isn't choosing the right model. It's wiring 50+ autonomous agents together without chaos.

Who's building the pipes? I want to follow them.

engagement_triggers: Hot take framing signals debate opportunity
Establishes authority by identifying emerging role

product_marketing_tweet.draft:
You know that 5-step process to turn articles into training data? The one where you copy → paste → clean → format → pray?

Built Mdify because that's 5 steps too many.

One click. Clean .md. Ready for agents.

Works on Medium, Substack, news sites.

Link in bio.

engagement_triggers: Relatable pain point resonates with developers

expected_signals.retweets: Medium - if it solves real pain

engagement_strategy.approach: Quality over quantity - thoughtful replies to trending AI/developer content

Share relevant experiences with similar tools
